allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force scripts, ingest, data | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kilimchoi/engineering-blogs/master/engineering_blogs.opml" -OutFile "data\\seed.opml"; Get-Content "data\\seed.opml" -TotalCount 12; \(Select-String -Path "data\\seed.opml" -Pattern 'xmlUrl' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count)

PowerShell(node ingest/run.mjs --limit 12 2>&1 | Out-String; \(Get-Content data\\state.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).PSObject.Properties | Select-Object -First 3 Name, @{n='status';e={$_.Value.status}}, @{n='depth';e={$_.Value.backfillDepth}}, @{n='etag';e={[bool]$_.Value.etag}} | Format-Table)
